title: Acceleration (Accel)
text: Acceleration (Accel) Rate at which the value of the spin button is incremented, expressed as a percentage. Default is 5 . Accel = Percentage Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: Repeat and Increment Value Description To disable acceleration, specify zero (0). Every time the repeat interval defined by the Repeat property elapses, it is shortened by the percentage specified until the maximum repeat rate (about 20 repetitions per second) is reached. After that, every time the repeat interval elapses, the Increment Value is incremented by the percentage specified. Applies To uspinbutton (SpinButton) Related Links Repeat Repeat interval for auto-repeat behavior, in milliseconds. The default is 250 (four repetitions per second). Increment Value Amount by which the value in the spin button is increased each time it is clicked. The default is 1. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
